messages.message: 'formatBytes' is assigned a value but never used. Allowed unused vars must match /^[A-Z_]/u.
The 'handleFiles' function makes the dependencies of useCallback Hook (at line 40) change on every render. To fix this, wrap the definition of 'handleFiles' in its own useCallback() Hook.

suggestions.desc: Wrap the definition of 'handleFiles' in its own useCallback() Hook.
